title: Discord node fails to process image upload
symptom: When attempting to send an image via the Discord node, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'error')'. The image is not being processed correctly.
applies_when: Image is uploaded as binary data
not_this_if: Image is not uploaded or is in a different format
root_cause: The Discord node requires the binary property name to be specified correctly. If the input field is incorrectly formatted or includes unnecessary text, the node cannot locate the binary data, leading to the error.
fix_steps: In the Input Data Field Name, enter only the binary property name without any additional text or expressions
Ensure the binary data is correctly set up in the previous node
agent_instruction: Set the Input Data Field Name in the Discord node to just 'Upload_a_screenshot_of_your_characters_on_your_first_account'.
